message:
test(tui): add /login flow and memory-pressure integration tests

Add TUI integration tests for the auth login command flow and memory
pressure behavior:

Auth flow tests:
- tui_login_no_args_shows_provider_table: verifies /login with no args
  renders available providers table with guidance
- tui_login_openai_starts_auth_flow: verifies /login openai shows API key
  prompt with platform.openai.com link
- tui_refresh_failure_shows_recovery_message: verifies expired OAuth token
  guidance appears as system message
- tui_login_unknown_provider_shows_error: verifies unknown provider shows
  actionable error
- tui_login_gemini_aliases_to_google: verifies /login gemini resolves to
  google API key flow

Performance integration:
- MockRssReader for controllable memory pressure simulation
- tui_perf_memory_pressure_forces_degraded: verifies high memory pressure
  triggers degraded rendering mode

Includes structured JSONL test telemetry (pi.test.auth_event.v1,
pi.test.perf_event.v1) for CI observability via log_auth_test_event()
and log_perf_test_event() helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
